text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day following my impactful first encounter with Air Groove, I
overhear a frantic voice in the hallway.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Trainer
text_block_list.text: Wh-why won't you listen to me? I'm Air Groove's trainer, am I not?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy respects its students' autonomy above all else. That
is why the student council system exists to begin with.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
But if she attempts to keep up with student council activities and
tutoring, it will hinder her own growth. So please!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove has joined the student council with clear intention and
purpose. No one can have her abdicate the role but herself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Have you consulted with her on the matter of quitting the student
council?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Trainer
text_block_list.text: W-well...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: No, I can't recall her ever doing so.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Trainer
text_block_list.text: Air Groove? But why are you here right now?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry to have let this disturb you, Miss President. I'll talk to her
alone from here.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? I'll be on my way then. Just... don't be too hard on her,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...I'll try.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Now then... I think you've overstepped the line.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Wait—please listen to what I have to say! I'm just worried that you
might be spending your precious time on things that don't matter!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Things that "don't matter"? If that's how you see it, then I see no
further point trying to reason with you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
No... Why? Don't you want to be winning races? You need to consider
how you manage the time you spend!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Winning races, you say... If that's your sole concern, then I'm afraid we
were never going to see eye-to-eye.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This conversation is finished. Consider our contract void as of this
very moment. Now, if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh brother, there she goes doin' it again.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yep. Honestly, I'm not sure if she'll ever find a trainer who lives up to
her crazy standards...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you've been starin' at Air Groove all slack-jawed again?! You
don't learn either, do you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but wait. I guess this would be something of a chance for you
then, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Look at that! You could go over and try to scout her right now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Course, as you saw just now, the Empress isn't exactly easy to win
over. If I were you, I'd take my time and—oh. Welp, so much for
waiting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined not to miss this opportunity, I quickly chase after Air
Groove. Upon reaching the boulevard outside the school building,
she stops and gives a sigh of frustration.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Good heavens... For a school as prestigious as Tracen, it sure does
seem to be lacking in quality trainers as of late.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: If only there were someone I could fully place my trust in...
choice_data_list: Air Groove, I've come to scout you!
Air Groove, I've come to scout you!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Huh? And just who on earth are you? Bold of you to make such a wild statement out of nowhere!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can understand why she's frustrated at the moment, so I remain
strong and politely state my intentions.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. You're persistent, I'll give you that. But I'm sorry—I've had
enough with trainers at the moment.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: And I'm certainly not about to sign up with a greenhorn trainer like—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Actually, wait.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I plan to do some strength training tomorrow at the campus gym.
Bring me your proposed strength-training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If you can prove some basic competence as a trainer, then maybe
we'll talk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend the entire night frantically constructing a prospective training
course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I'll give you a pass. It looks like you have what it takes to
manage a regimen at least.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Here are the terms of our contract: you shall guide me in training, and concern yourself only with my training.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Everything else will be left up to me. That includes my involvement in
the student council and the management of my own free time.
choice_data_list:
So does this mean you're accepting my scouting
offer?

So does this mean you're accepting my scouting
offer?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes, as long as you stick to the terms. So let's make this formal.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I am the Empress, Air Groove. I aim to embody the ideals of all
Umamusume and serve as a guiding beacon for all.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
While results on the track are of course essential, they're far from all I
seek. If I can't garner the admiration befitting an empress, they mean
nothing.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You'll have a very specific role to play amidst these aspirations. I trust
you understand that?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I sense a bit of hesitancy. I'll overlook it for now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Not like I plan to actually rely on you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus begin my days of supporting Air Groove as she runs a noble
path.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Is that all for today? I'll be taking my leave, then.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm hardly compelled to tell you... but no matter. I spend time guiding
some of the more junior students.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The academy offers instruction for runners who haven't signed up with
a trainer, but it's a uniform curriculum that can't account for every
student's needs.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Some students find themselves struggling with the lack of
personalized guidance. I aim to simply keep them on track until they
find a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Now, if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What? A meeting? Now?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No can do—I'm on my way to attend a student council cleanup event.
Besides, I've told you to give at least one day's notice when making
schedule changes.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Compile all your points in a document and send it to me later. I'll take
a look at least.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our contract has only just begun, but I've quickly come to appreciate
the concerns her previous trainers have shown...
